AR1.justification: Daybook entry with Intent/Log/Handoff/Guardrails-for-next-session matches daybook/AGENTS.md structure; decisions.md correctly untouched with rationale tying to the strict bar and provenance-marker convention.

AR3.justification: Daybook date anchor is ISO and stable; prose mentions decisions.md and tmp/adr-draft.md as relative paths, but no explicit cross-reference back from daybook to the draft path is documented in the action trace.

AR4.justification: Only a new date-stamped daybook file is created; draft untouched, decisions.md untouched — fully append-only and idempotent on re-run.
